private int dp(int mask, int[] nums, int n, int[] memo) {
    if (mask == 0) return 0;
    if (memo[mask] != -1) return memo[mask];
    int count = Integer.bitCount(mask);
    int step = ( ( (2*n - count) / 2 ) +1 );
    int max = 0;
    for (int i=0; i<m; i++) {
        if ( (mask & (1<<i)) ==0 ) continue;
        for (int j=i+1; j<m; j++) {
            if ( (mask & (1<<j)) !=0 ) {
                int newMask = mask ^ ( (1<<i) | (1<<j) );
                int currentGCD = gcd(nums[i], nums[j]);
                int currentScore = step * currentGCD + dp(newMask, nums, n, memo);
                if (currentScore > max) max = currentScore;
            }
        }
    }
    memo[mask] = max;
    return max;
}

class Solution {
    public int maxScore(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length / 2;
        int m = nums.length;
        int[] memo = new int[1 << m];
        Arrays.fill(memo, -1);
        return dp((1 << m) -1, nums, memo, n);
    }

    private int dp(int mask, int[] nums, int[] memo, int n) {
        if (mask == 0) return 0;
        if (memo[mask] != -1) return memo[mask];
        int count = Integer.bitCount(mask);
        int step = ( ( (2*n - count) / 2 ) +1 );
        int max = 0;
        for (int i=0; i<nums.length; i++) {
            if ( (mask & (1<<i)) ==0 ) continue;
            for (int j=i+1; j<nums.length; j++) {
                if ( (mask & (1<<j)) !=0 ) {
                    int newMask = mask & ~ ( (1<<i) | (1<<j) );
                    int currentGCD = gcd(nums[i], nums[j]);
                    int currentScore = step * currentGCD + dp(newMask, nums, memo, n);
                    if (currentScore > max) max = currentScore;
                }
            }
        }
        memo[mask] = max;
        return max;
    }

    private int gcd(int a, int b) {
        while (b !=0 ) {
            int temp = b;
            b = a % b;
            a = temp;
        }
        return a;
    }
}

private int dp(int mask, int[] nums, int n, int[] memo) {
    if (mask == 0) return 0;
    if (memo[mask] != -1) return memo[mask];
    int count = Integer.bitCount(mask);
    int step = ( ( (2*n - count) / 2 ) +1 );
    int max = 0;
    for (int i=0; i<m; i++) {
        if ( (mask & (1<<i)) ==0 ) continue;
        for (int j=i+1; j<m; j++) {
            if ( (mask & (1<<j)) !=0 ) {
                int newMask = mask ^ ( (1<<i) | (1<<j) );
                int currentGCD = gcd(nums[i], nums[j]);
                int currentScore = step * currentGCD + dp(newMask, nums, n, memo);
                if (currentScore > max) max = currentScore;
            }
        }
    }
    memo[mask] = max;
    return max;
}

class Solution {
    public int maxScore(int[] nums) {
        int n = nums.length / 2;
        int m = nums.length;
        int[] memo = new int[1 << m];
        Arrays.fill(memo, -1);
        return dp((1 << m) -1, nums, memo, n);
    }

    private int dp(int mask, int[] nums, int[] memo, int n) {
        if (mask == 0) return 0;
        if (memo[mask] != -1) return memo[mask];
        int count = Integer.bitCount(mask);
        int step = ( ( (2*n - count) / 2 ) +1 );
        int max = 0;
        for (int i=0; i<nums.length; i++) {
            if ( (mask & (1<<i)) ==0 ) continue;
            for (int j=i+1; j<nums.length; j++) {
                if ( (mask & (1<<j)) !=0 ) {
                    int newMask = mask & ~ ( (1<<i) | (1<<j) );
                    int currentGCD = gcd(nums[i], nums[j]);
                    int currentScore = step * currentGCD + dp(newMask, nums, memo, n);
                    if (currentScore > max) max = currentScore;
                }
            }
        }
        memo[mask] = max;
        return max;
    }

    private int gcd(int a, int b) {
        while (b !=0 ) {
            int temp = b;
            b = a % b;
            a = temp;
        }
        return a;
    }
}
